headline: Revvity (RVTY) Joins Anthropic Directory To Bring Claude Into Signals Research Workflows
summary: Revvity's (NYSE:RVTY) Signals Software platform has joined Anthropic's Model Context Protocol directory. The move connects Signals AI to Anthropic's Claude models, aiming to streamline scientific data access and analysis. This development is positioned to expand how researchers interact with complex R&D datasets using AI tools. For investors watching Revvity, this news sits at the intersection of lab software and advanced AI. The company is already active in scientific research tools, and...

headline: 3 Healthcare Stocks We Think Twice About
summary: Personal health and wellness is one of the many secular tailwinds for healthcare companies. Shareholders who bet on the industry have been rewarded lately as healthcare stocks have returned 10% over the past six months, topping the S&P 500 by 2.3 percentage points.
